content: PO lifecycle in SME supply chain software typically has stages: Draft → Submitted/Ordered → Acknowledged by supplier → Partially/Fully Received → Closed/Cancelled. Key features: line-item detail, automatic inventory update on goods receipt, full audit trail of every status change, visibility across all open POs. For SME MVP the minimal viable lifecycle is Draft→Ordered→Received with line items and auto-inventory update on receipt.
